states.name: Mysha
states.title: Fox-Eared Blader
states.description:
Let's go!
Just like always, Mysha can be seen swinging her greatsword, kicking up gusts of wind. Someone once asked her if she didn't get bored doing the same thing every day.
"Of course not! It's totally different every time. I was faster yesterday than the day before. I'm stronger today than I was yesterday. And I'll be even better tomorrow!"
She keeps on striving toward the pinnacle.

states.name: Mysha
states.title: Fox-Eared Blader
states.description:
She may not remember her birth parents well, but she grew up with Gilgan, so she's able to keep smiling.
She may not be kud, but the people of Urg Roa accepted her all the same, so she's able to keep smiling.
She's faced many hardships, but she's been blessed with happiness above and beyond the dark times. "That's why I want to keep smiling forever!"
"Konkon! May good fortune, safety, and happiness be with you always!"

states.name: Mysha
states.title: Fox-Eared Blader
states.description:
Uncle Druke...
"Grrrrgh!!"
"Gramps has always waited for you, you know. He always looks so sad..."
She calls out to him over and over, but the beast shows no recognition.
"The more stories I heard about you, the prouder I was about you. Even if we aren't related by blood, I'm proud to be your niece. And now we've finally met, but..."
